abilities.name: 독수
abilities.description: 접촉하기만 해도 상대를 독 상태로 만들 때가 있다.

abilities.name: 짓궂은마음
abilities.description: 변화 기술을 먼저 쓸 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.
Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life.
